actual_continuous_profitable_days.rationale: Base centered at the 90-day commitment per the actual-vs-commitment default. Downside captures Issue 2's blackout-overrun stress test (relocation breaks continuity, restart with depleted day-budget); upside is bounded just past the measurement window.

actual_daily_noi_usd.rationale: Base centered at the $50K daily-NOI commitment per actual-vs-commitment default. Downside captures Premortem stress test ($5–10K/day operational outages) plus T2CA throughput drag; upside reflects 60% high-roller mix executing at upper yield.

actual_total_spend_usd.rationale: Base centered at the $600M committed ceiling — the Pioneer's Gauntlet envelope is sized to be deployed. Downside reflects lean execution; upside captures Review-plan $10M+ legal cost (Risk 1), $2M T2CA hardening (Issue 2), $2M supply-chain shock (Risk 3).

actual_segregated_contingency_usd.rationale: Base centered at the $90M (15%) ring-fenced commitment per actual-vs-commitment default. Downside captures Q6 competition (microgrid + $5M diplomatic-design drawdown pressure on the same envelope); upside capped at target since segregation has no overshoot meaning.

actual_blackout_days.rationale: Base centered at the 7-day blackout commitment per actual-vs-commitment default. Downside reflects best-case pre-fabricated container move; upside captures Issue 2 stress test of blackout overrun breaking the 90-day continuous-profit window.
